name: immich-public-proxy

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "tsx watch src/index.ts" "tsc -w -p tsconfig.client.json"
scripts.test:container: podman build --build-arg PACKAGE_VERSION=$(npm pkg get version | xargs) --format docker -t immich-proxy-test .. && podman run --init -it -p=3000:3000 --env-file .env --restart=always immich-proxy-test

author: Alan Grainger
description: Share your Immich photos and albums in a safe way without exposing your Immich instance to the public.
